message:
bd-3bxhj.3.5: Canonicalize effects into deterministic command/subscription model

Adds effect_canonical module that transforms extracted effect semantics
from the IR into a deterministic execution model aligned with ftui-runtime:

- ExecutionModel: Command (one-shot Cmd::Task), Subscription (continuous
  background thread), FireAndForget (no result message)
- Classification: Timer/Subscription/Process → Subscription; Network/Dom/
  Storage → Command; Telemetry → FireAndForget; Other → heuristic-based
- TriggerCondition: OnMount (empty deps), OnDependencyChange (explicit deps)
- MessageProtocol: DataResult, Tick, EventStream, Silent, Polymorphic
- CleanupStrategy: None, SubscriptionStop, ExplicitAction, AbortInFlight
- AsyncBoundary: ThreadPool, DedicatedThread, Synchronous
- Idempotency and determinism classification per effect kind
- Ordering constraints from write→read state dependencies (topological sort)
- verify_determinism() checks for replay safety issues (C001-C003)
- compute_execution_order() with deterministic topological sort
- ClassificationConfidence with rationale strings

26 tests covering all effect kinds, edge cases, and ordering semantics.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
